title: Find Maximum Element
description: Given an array of integers, find and return the maximum element.

title: Sum of Array
description: Given an array of integers, return the sum of all elements.

title: Count Even Numbers
description: Given an array of integers, count how many even numbers are present.

title: Check Palindrome String
description: Given a string, check if it is a palindrome. Return true or false.

title: Reverse String
description: Given a string, return the reversed version of it.

title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers and a target, return indices of the two numbers that add up to the target. Return as i,j format.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Given a string containing just the characters ( ) { } [ ], determine if the input string is valid. Return true or false.

title: Find Second Largest
description: Given an array of integers, find and return the second largest element. If no second largest exists return -1.

title: Fibonacci Number
description: Given n, return the nth Fibonacci number (0-indexed). F(0)=0, F(1)=1, F(n)=F(n-1)+F(n-2).

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating
description: Given a string, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
